backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing e-commerce backend with product/order management, user profiles, tuition consultancy (student leads, teacher registrations), documentation requests, admin access control, blob storage integration, and demo product seeding.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of DocumentationPage component with service categories, online vs centre visit comparison, pricing section, and associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, cart/wishlist context, query hooks, header/navigation, product displays, service sections, forms, and modals with deep navy blue theming throughout.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for UI elements including sidebar, charts, and semantic tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for StudyNeeds application with SEO meta tags, favicon reference, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with 10 routes (home, shop, product, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin, tuition, documentation), wrapping with cart/wishlist providers, and conditionally rendering profile setup modal and WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/admin/Documentat: Modal for viewing and managing documentation request details including personal information, status updates, and document downloads. Allows admin to change request status.
Admin interface for managing documentation requests with search, status filtering, and table view. Opens detail modal when viewing individual requests.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderDetai: A modal dialog component for displaying order details that currently shows a placeholder message indicating backend support is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: An admin page component for managing orders with search and filter UI elements, currently displaying a placeholder message that backend support is required.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: A modal form component for creating and editing products with image upload support, using React Query mutations to interact with the backend API.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsMa: An admin page component that displays a searchable, filterable table of products with add, edit, and delete functionality using React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/StudentLea: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a student lead including student info, contact details, location, budget, and requirements.
frontend/src/components/admin/TeacherReg: A modal dialog component that displays comprehensive details about a teacher registration including personal information, professional qualifications, experience, and teaching preferences.
An admin page component that displays a searchable table of teacher registrations with filtering capabilities and the ability to view detailed information for each registration.
frontend/src/components/admin/TuitionLea: Admin component for managing student tuition leads with search, filtering, status display, and a modal for viewing lead details. Fetches leads using useGetAllStudentLeads hook and displays them in a table with formatted dates and status badges.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserDetail: Modal dialog component for displaying user details that currently shows a placeholder message indicating the functionality is not yet implemented and requires backend support.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersManag: Admin component for user management that displays a placeholder UI with disabled search and empty table, indicating the feature requires backend implementation.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected route component that verifies user authentication and admin status, showing loading states during verification and unauthorized message before redirecting non-admin users to homepage.
frontend/src/components/BannerSlider.tsx: Auto-rotating carousel component displaying 5 promotional banners with manual navigation arrows, dot indicators, and 5-second auto-advance interval.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesMenu.t: Modal overlay component displaying a grid of 8 product categories (Stationery, Books, School Bags, etc.) with icons and links to category pages. Includes backdrop and close button.
frontend/src/components/CategoriesSectio: Homepage section component showing 8 product categories in a responsive grid with icons and hover effects. Each category links to its respective shop page.
frontend/src/components/DocumentationSer: Form component for submitting documentation service requests (certificates, cards, applications, etc.) with file upload support. Converts files to ExternalBlob format and displays success confirmation after submission.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with four columns: About, Policies, Contact info with social media links, and Newsletter signup form. Includes company information and current year display.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main site header with logo, search bar, location selector, cart icon, and authentication controls. Includes Internet Identity integration and responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/LocationSelector: Modal component for selecting delivery location from a grid of 24 major Indian cities. Features backdrop overlay, city selection with visual feedback, and auto-close on selection.
frontend/src/components/MobileMenu.tsx: Slide-in mobile navigation menu with links to Home, Shop, and Admin Panel. Includes Internet Identity authentication button with login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a product card with image, pricing, discount badge, rating, wishlist toggle, and action buttons (Add to Cart, Buy Now). Links to product detail page and integrates with cart and wishlist contexts.
frontend/src/components/ProductSection.t: Renders a section with a title and a grid of up to 8 product cards. Returns null if no products are provided.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for completing user profile with required fields (name, email, phone, address). Prevents closing until profile is saved via mutation hook.
Displays a grid of four service cards (E-Commerce, Tuition, Documentation, Career Counselling) with icons, descriptions, and navigation buttons. Some services are marked as coming soon.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Carousel component displaying customer testimonials with name, role, rating, and text. Includes previous/next navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with predefined phone number and message.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays five feature cards (Trusted Platform, Affordable Pricing, Local Support, Verified Teachers, Fast Delivery) in a grid layout with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context provider for shopping cart functionality with localStorage persistence, managing cart items, quantities, and providing methods to add, update, remove items and calculate totals.
frontend/src/context/WishlistContext.tsx: React context provider for wishlist functionality with localStorage persistence, managing product IDs and providing methods to add, remove, and check wishlist items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile using React Query and the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including products, user profiles, admin checks, student leads, teacher registrations, and documentation requests with query invalidation and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Simple re-export hook that provides access to the WishlistContext functionality.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Poppins font and Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space with a deep navy blue primary color (#001f3f) from the StudyNeeds logo.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing products, orders, users, tuition leads, teacher registrations, and documentation requests. Displays summary cards showing counts for each category and uses custom hooks to fetch data.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls, calculates totals including delivery charges, and shows an empty state when cart is empty. Allows users to update quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with delivery address form and payment method selection (COD/online). Currently shows a warning that order placement functionality is not yet available and requires backend support.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentationPage.tsx: Landing page for online documentation and cyber services featuring a hero section, service categories, trust badges, and CTAs for online application, center visit, and WhatsApp contact. Includes an accordion FAQ section and service request form.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage that displays banner slider, categories, multiple product sections (trending, school essentials, budget deals, furniture), services section, why choose section, and testimonials. Uses product query hook to fetch and filter products by category and criteria.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page displaying a success message with a green checkmark icon, estimated delivery time (3-5 business days), and a button to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailsPage.ts: Product details page component displaying product images, pricing with discounts, quantity selector, add-to-cart/buy-now actions, and related products section using TanStack Router and cart context.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Shop page with category sidebar navigation, product grid display, and sorting options (price, rating, popularity) for filtering and browsing products across 9 categories.
frontend/src/pages/TuitionPage.tsx: Tuition marketplace page with demo teacher listings, student lead submission form, teacher registration form with file uploads, and FAQ accordion sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, Poppins font family, extended animations for accordions, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for StudyNeeds platform detailing implemented features including documentation/cyber services page, service categories, pricing model, admin panel with Internet Identity, and WhatsApp integration.
